videos.headline: Red Murdock scores a 31-yard house call TD vs. Liberty
videos.description: Red Murdock takes it to the house with a 31-yard pick-six to give Buffalo a 26-0 lead vs. Liberty.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Red Murdock scores a 31-yard house call TD vs. Liberty) 2025/01/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Liberty's Billy Lucas has a nice 55-yard run vs. Buffalo
videos.description: Billy Lucas finds a pocket and runs for 55 yards in the second quarter vs. Buffalo.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Liberty's Billy Lucas has a nice 55-yard run vs. Buffalo) 2025/01/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Buffalo's Al-Jay Henderson takes it to the house with a TD
videos.description: Al-Jay Henderson scores a 45-yard touchdown to give Buffalo a 16-0 lead vs. Liberty.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Buffalo's Al-Jay Henderson takes it to the house with a TD) 2025/01/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Reese Smith gets Liberty on the board with a TD
videos.description: Liberty avoids a shutout by Reese Smith scoring a 36-yard touchdown in the fourth quarter vs. Buffalo.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Reese Smith gets Liberty on the board with a TD) 2025/01/04 ESHEET
